e38863c1-9173-49cc-8016-4c86029cb29d.resume_text:
BHAVYA KONAGALA	  Email: bhavyakonagala@gmail.com Mobile: +91-913-3188-549
Objective
Motivated B.Tech Computer Science student seeking an internship or entry-level role to apply technical skills in software development, problem-solving, and emerging technologies.
Skills Summary

Software: C Language, Data Structure in C, JAVA, Python, MYSQL, Html, CSS, JavaScript, 
Platforms: Windows, Linux
Soft Skills:  Communication, Problem-solving, Teamwork, Time-management, Leadership

Education
Vignan Deemed to be University	Andhra Pradesh, India
Bachelor of Technology – Computer Science 	July 2023 – till Date 
1st Year and 2nd Year CGPA (sem1-sem4): 7.7

Bhaskara Junior College	Andhra Pradesh, India
Intermediate - MPC; CGPA: 9.3	July 2021 - June 2023

Narayana e-techno School	Bangalore, India
Class 10 CGPA - 8.00	May 2021
External Trainings
Completed external training programs in Java, C Programming, and Python.
Certifications
Internship Experience
Machine Learning Intern, SkillCraft Technology – June 2025
Worked on Python-based ML models.
Java Developer Intern, StaxTech – June–July 2025
Built and debugged Java applications.
Infosys SpringBoard, Virtual Internship 2.0 – Present
Built a Personalized cover letter generator.
Projects & Hackathons

Field Project: Vedic Wisdom Web Application:
Developed an interactive web application that provides structured knowledge from Vedic scriptures, offering problem-solving insights and guided chanting. Implemented features such as categorized scriptures, a problem-solution section, an interactive quiz module, and a responsive user interface. 
Technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript for front-end development and GitHub Pages for hosting.
BookFlick — MERN Recommendation Platform
Full-stack web app offering personalized book and movie recommendations with reviews and star ratings.
Features: Authentication, user reviews, rating system, responsive UI
Tech Stack: MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js
STACKHACK 2025 — Built a Smart E-Commerce product recommendation platform.
HackXLerate (ByteXL)2025 — Built Vahan Bazar marketplace with model comparison & EMI tools (React, Node.js).
Achievements
  Built a Generative AI model during NextWave Program (2024).
 Developed Smart E-Commerce Recommendation Platform at STACKHACK Hackathon (2025).
 Advanced to Round 1 in HackXLerate Hackathon by ByteXL (2025).
Awarded Grade A in Cambridge Preliminary English Test (2023).
Extracurricular Activities
NSS volunteer: Organized health drives, blood donation & community awareness programs
Coordinated technical, cultural & team events
Fashion designing (creative & event styling)
Hobbies and Interests
Swimming, Zumba, Photography, Painting 


I hereby declare that the information furnished above is true to the best of Knowledge




[BHAVYA KONAGALA]
Place: Guntur 
Date: 13-Mar-2026


Mr. Rahul Sharma
HR Manager
Infosys Limited
Electronics City, Hosur Road
Bengaluru, Karnataka 560100
 Job Title: Software Developer Intern
Company: Infosys Limited
Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka
Employment Type: Internship / Ful1-Time
Job Description:
Infosys Limited is seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Software Developer Intern to join our dynamic engineering team. The candidate will assist in
designing, developing, and maintaining scalable software applications while collaborating with cross-functional teams..
Key Responsibilities:
Develop and test software applications using Java, Python, or related technologies.
Assist in debugging and troubleshooting application issues
Work with databases such as MysQL
Support front-end development using HTML, css, and JavaScript.
Participate in code reviews and agile development processes
Required Skills:
Strong knowledge of programming fundamenta1s
Understanding of Data Structures and Algorithms
Basic knowledge of database management systems
Good communication and teamwork skills
e38863c1-9173-49cc-8016-4c86029cb29d.cover_letter:
Here is a highly personalized, professional cover letter:

[BHAVYA KONAGALA]
[Date: March 13, 2026]

Mr. Rahul Sharma,
HR Manager,
Infosys Limited,
Electronics City, Hosur Road,
Bengaluru, Karnataka 560100.

Dear Mr. Sharma,

I am thrilled to submit my application for the Software Developer Intern position at Infosys Limited. As a motivated and detail-oriented B.Tech Computer Science student with a passion for software development, I am confident that my skills, experience, and education make me an ideal candidate for this role.

With a strong foundation in programming fundamentals, data structures, and algorithms, I have developed a solid understanding of software development principles. My proficiency in languages such as Java, Python, C, and HTML/CSS, along with experience working with databases like MySQL, makes me well-equipped to assist in designing, developing, and maintaining scalable software applications.

As a versatile problem-solver, I thrive in collaborative environments and am comfortable working on complex projects. My experience as a machine learning intern at SkillCraft Technology and Java developer intern at StaxTech has honed my skills in debugging, troubleshooting, and testing application issues. Additionally, my participation in hackathons like STACKHACK and HackXLerate has taught me the importance of agile development processes and code reviews.

I am particularly drawn to this internship because of Infosys's commitment to innovation and its reputation for providing a supportive environment for students to grow. My project, Vedic Wisdom Web Application, which provided users with problem-solving insights and guided chanting, demonstrates my ability to develop interactive web applications using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. I believe that this experience will enable me to make valuable contributions to your team.

As a volunteer in the National Service Scheme (NSS), I have organized health drives, blood donation camps, and community awareness programs, showcasing my ability to work effectively in teams and take on leadership roles when necessary. My hobbies in swimming, Zumba, photography, and painting indicate a creative and curious nature that will enable me to bring fresh perspectives to your team.

In conclusion, I am excited about the opportunity to join Infosys's dynamic engineering team as a Software Developer Intern. With my technical skills, problem-solving abilities, and passion for software development, I am confident that I can make a positive impact at Infosys. I look forward to discussing my application with you further.

Thank you for considering my application.

Sincerely,

[BHAVYA KONAGALA]

P.S.: Please find attached my resume, Bhavya Resume 1.docx, which provides more details about my education, skills, and experience.

messages.content: The role being applied for is a "Software Developer Intern" at Infosys Limited.
